feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Integrate SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud to SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We want to connect our SAP S/4 HANA Private Cloud systems (RISE subscription) to SAP Signavio Process Insights but currently we don't have active SAP BTP subscription , Could you please let us know if we can integrate in any other way possible ?

Thanks in Adavance

Subasri

entry.title: Client copy
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please let us know the steps to copy master and transactional data from one client to another client in S4 hana public cloud. will implementing our S4hana tenant we had opted for demo data, we only get one client is it, when we opt for demo data?? 

 Regards,

Bharath.G

entry.title: HANA Design-Time HDI composite role
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to create a design-time HDI composite role using roles created in other HDI schemas. I use HANA XSA with SP7 and have containers A and B with schema roles, then I create container C with a composite role.

  1. Add services in mta for A and B
  2. Grant the roles of A and B via .hdbgrants to #OO of container C
  3. add UPS service in mta and grant system privilege ROLE ADMIN via .hdbgrants to #OO of container C
  4. Create composite role .hdbrole using schema_roles with the same roles of A and B. I can see and select the roles of A and B in the Role Editor. 

The build of .hdbrole fails with "not authorized to access the referenced object" without a guid. I suspect because of absence "grantable to other" / with_admin_option for the roles in A, B in #OO of C.

#DI.GRANT_CONTAINER_SCHEMA_ROLES doesn't have a form with _WITH_GRANT_OPTION.

I don't want to use CATALOG roles because they are not transportable.

Does anyone know how to create a composite role right in XSA or HANA Cloud?

entry.title: Can you provide suggestions for migrating data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public)?
entry.content:
Hi ,
Aside from the staging table approach, can data migration be achieved using standard iFlows in SAP Cloud Platform Integration, or would we need to create custom iFlows or custom programs for this purpose?

Are there any other methods or third-party tools that can be used?

entry.title: Journal Entry Analyzer
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

My client wants a group of users to see specific G/L accounts in the Journal Entry Analyzer app. 
Can anyone know if this is possible and if yes how it can be?

Kind regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Connecting to SAP HANA using SAP/cloud-sdk-java
entry.content:
Hi

The question is in the title to some degree. If it is possible, I'd love to see a code example. Also, I notice that com.sap.cloud.sdk.s4hana » s4hana-connectivity is deprecated. What replaces it?

entry.title: Error: Create Database Artifacts Using Core Data Services (CDS) for SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Thomas,

Getting errors during the deployment of database artifacts using the "rocket icon" in the SAP HANA Projects view. The HDI Container is in a BOUND state. I can see the Schema, and connect to the HANA Database Explorer using the Technical User but unable to see the Tables and views as the deployment of the Database Artifacts failed.

Below is the error log -

"Executing task in folder db: echo 'Could not prepare environment: Error: A valid project path is required to find the DB folder for "cds build"' && exit 1 && (npm ls --depth 0 --production || npm install) && (npm start -- --exit)

Could not prepare environment: Error: A valid project path is required to find the DB folder for "cds build"

* The terminal process "/bin/bash '-c', 'echo 'Could not prepare environment: Error: A valid project path is required to find the DB folder for "cds build"' && exit 1 && (npm ls --depth 0 --production || npm install) && (npm start -- --exit)'" failed to launch (exit code: 1).
* Terminal will be reused by tasks, press any key to close it."

Regards,

Tanmoy

SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database 

@thomas_jung 

 

 

 

 

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Maintaining Long Text under Customer Text in Maintain Business Partner
entry.content: Hello Experts, how can I maintain long text in Maintain Business Partner under customer text field

entry.title: How to Make incoming payment line of Business Mandatory if row is selected in sap B1
entry.content:
I am trying to write Sp transaction notification for incoming payment whose line of business should not  empty or null if that row is selected for payment. 

Kindly help on this

entry.title: BADI for Supplier Invoice Reversal In S4 HANA CLOUD
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP S4 HANA Cloud

We have a requirement to display a warning message whenever a Supplier invoice is reversed using the App Display Supplier Invoices. For this, we intend to write custom logic in the BADI, however, are unable to find the appropriate one in Cloud. Kindly suggest the BADI that can be used to meet this requirement.

 

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: How to Secure Endpoints in SAP BTP AND User Authentication
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working on securing the endpoints in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and would appreciate some guidance on best practices and available methods for implementing robust security measures, particularly focusing on user authentication.


Thanks 
Rituraj Kumar

entry.title: How to activate the following services in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Please can you tell me how to activate the following services (SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment and SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime) from SAP Cloud ALM, they are created but have not yet been activated, I am attaching a reference image.

entry.title: How do I extract data from SAP R/3 (4.7) ?
entry.content:
Hi,

As we are trying to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public) through staging tables, could you please suggest possible ways to extract data from version 4.7? We need to extract all fields and tables (both specified and unspecified/classified and non-classified) from R/3.

We have attempted to extract data using transaction code SE16N, but we couldn't extract all tables, especially the classified ones. By using transaction code RSO2 for custom data source creation, we managed to extract some data, but not all fields from the tables. Kindly suggest possible ways to achieve complete data extraction, including any other transaction codes that may be useful.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to call API S/4Hana Public Cloud From SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
hi,

I need to call an api that is on my sap s/4hana public cloud from Cloud Integration.

so the communication is:  Cloud Integration -> s/4hana public cloud

I have created the communication system and Communication Arrangemts on s/4 hana public cloud.

I have created a destination on the cockpit of cloud integration.

But when on iflow I try to call the API with the OData adapter, it gives me a connection error:

 

 

what am I missing?

entry.title: How to get data from Hana Cloud with SAPUI5 (SAPUI5, Hana Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello everyone! I created tables in Hana Cloud. How to get data from SAP HANA Cloud using SAPUI5? I use to MVC.
Please, share the link information
SAPUI5 SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: SAP SLT Create time stamp wiped out with record update.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

i need a small help in modifing the code.

i have created a following incude program to fetch 'Create time stamp' ( zcolumn CRTTTM) in the Target HANDB when a record is replicated or inserted (IUUC_OPERAT_FLAG =I) . This is working fine.

However when the same record is updated (IUUC_OPERAT_FLAG  = 'U) the zcolumn (CRTTTM) with create timestamp is wiped out.

we want to hold this value

CODE/include: 

DATA: lv_name_create(30) TYPE c.
STATICS lv_Date TYPE sy-datum.

FIELD-SYMBOLS: <ls_record> TYPE any,
<ls_crt_record> TYPE any,
<lv_crttm> TYPE any,
<lv_operation> TYPE any.

CONCATENATE '<wa_r_' i_p1 '>' INTO lv_name_create.
ASSIGN (lv_name_create) TO <ls_record>.

ASSIGN COMPONENT 'IUUC_OPERAT_FLAG' OF STRUCTURE <ls_record> TO <lv_operation>.

CASE <lv_operation>.
WHEN 'I'.
*** set additional target fields
* set insert timestamp
ASSIGN COMPONENT 'CRTTTM' OF STRUCTURE <ls_record> TO <lv_crttm>.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
CONCATENATE sy-datum sy-uzeit INTO <lv_crttm>.
lv_date = <lv_crttm>.
ENDIF.
WHEN OTHERS.
ASSIGN COMPONENT 'CRTTTM' OF STRUCTURE <ls_record> TO <lv_crttm>.
IF sy-subrc = 0.
<lv_crttm> = lv_date.
ENDIF.
ENDCASE.

entry.title: App for download attachments invoices in mass
entry.content: Is there an app where we can download the attachments of several invoices at the same time, without having to search invoice by invoice?

entry.title: Getting '403' error accessing S/4 Public Cloud ODATA
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to extract Material Stock (SAP_COM_164) from S/4 Public Cloud system from CPI via ODATA V2 adapter but getting "403" error. 

In S/4, we have created Communication User (added CPI load balancer certs), Communication System (added the user here for Inbound communication) and then created communication arrangement.

ODATA connector:

Error:

Please suggest here. Our tenant is a trial account.

 

Br,

Arvik

entry.title: Setup SAP HANA external backup on AWS
entry.content:
We like to back up our S/4HANA Public Cloud data into external cloud storage (AWS S3) and have a daily incremental backup. 
Please guide us with relevant KBA Notes & process to establish.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to downgrade HANA Cloud version after an upgrade.
entry.content:
Hi,

We have our HANA Cloud instance up and running. However, over the period of time, we require to do Patch upgrade and Major Version upgrade also. 
I want to know, what should be our steps in case we want to rollback the HANA DB version to a previous version in case of inconsistency.
Help me with the guide or steps in-case we need to do rollback/rollover of our HANA DB so that we make sure no damage is done to our DB.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
